import * as React from "react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const Input = React.forwardRef<HTMLInputElement, React.ComponentProps<"input">>(
  ({ className, type, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <input
        type={type}
        className={tw.def([className], {
            display: "flex",
            height: "h-9",
            width: "w-full",
            borderRadius: "rounded-md",
            borderWidth: ["border", "border-input"],
            backgroundColor: "bg-transparent",
            padding: ["px-3", "py-1"],
            fontSize: "text-base",
            boxShadow: "shadow-sm",
            transitionProperty: "transition-colors",
            file: {
                borderWidth: "file:border-0",
                backgroundColor: "file:bg-transparent",
                fontSize: "file:text-sm",
                fontWeight: "file:font-medium",
                color: "file:text-foreground",
            },
            placeholder: {
                color: "placeholder:text-muted-foreground",
            },
            "focus-visible": {
                outlineStyle: "focus-visible:outline-none",
                boxShadow: ["focus-visible:ring-1", "focus-visible:ring-ring"],
            },
            disabled: {
                cursor: "disabled:cursor-not-allowed",
                opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
            },
            md: {
                fontSize: "md:text-sm",
            },
        })}
        ref={ref}
        {...props}
      />
    )
  }
)
Input.displayName = "Input"

export { Input }
